exercises.name: Barbell Bench Press
exercises.tip: Heavier, lower-rep pressing day. Focus on adding weight each week.
formTips: Feet planted, back arched slightly, shoulder blades pinched
Lower to lower chest — elbows at ~75 degrees
Drive hard off the chest — treat it like a deadlift

exercises.name: Barbell Row
exercises.tip: Overhand grip. Hinge to near-horizontal. Pull to your lower chest.
formTips: Hinge until your torso is around 45 degrees or lower
Pull bar into your belly — not your sternum
Hold at the top, then lower with control

exercises.name: Overhead Press
exercises.tip: Brace hard and press straight up. Lock out fully at the top.
formTips: Squeeze your glutes to prevent lower back hyperextension

exercises.name: Pull-Up
exercises.tip: Dead hang start. Lead with your elbows to pull chest to bar.
formTips: Full dead hang at the bottom
Drive elbows down — not just pull with arms
Chin over bar — no half reps

exercises.name: Cable Lateral Raise
exercises.tip: Light weight, high reps. Lead with your elbow and control the way down.

exercises.name: Barbell Back Squat
exercises.tip: Strength-focus squat day. Lower the weight to hit depth with good form.
formTips: Hit parallel or below every rep

exercises.name: Romanian Deadlift
exercises.tip: Hip hinge movement — feel your hamstrings stretch. Bar stays close to your legs.
formTips: Push hips back — don't bend knees first
Stop at the point of maximum stretch
Drive through your hips to stand

exercises.name: Leg Press
exercises.tip: Finish your quads when you're too fatigued for more squats.
formTips: Don't lock out at the top
Lower until knees are at 90 degrees

exercises.name: Leg Curl
exercises.tip: Isolate your hamstrings at the end of the session.
formTips: Hips stay flat on the pad

exercises.name: Calf Raise
exercises.tip: Full range of motion is the key with calves. Deep stretch at the bottom.
formTips: Rise all the way to tiptoe

exercises.name: Incline Dumbbell Press
exercises.tip: Hypertrophy-focus upper day. Higher reps, more volume.
formTips: Lower to a full chest stretch

exercises.name: Cable Seated Row
exercises.tip: Squeeze your shoulder blades at the end of every rep.
formTips: Hold the contraction for a beat

exercises.name: Dumbbell Shoulder Press
exercises.tip: Slightly in front of your ears at the bottom, full lockout at the top.
formTips: Keep your lower back from arching excessively
Elbows slightly in front of your torso

exercises.name: Lat Pulldown
exercises.tip: Wide overhand grip. Pull to your upper chest, leading with your elbows.
formTips: Pull bar to upper chest, not neck
Full stretch at the top — arms completely extended

exercises.name: Dumbbell Curl
exercises.tip: Supinate at the top and squeeze hard.
formTips: Keep elbows pinned to your sides

exercises.name: Tricep Pushdown
exercises.tip: Elbows stay pinned. Full extension on every rep.
formTips: Lock your elbows at your sides
Don't lean into the stack for extra weight

exercises.name: Deadlift
exercises.tip: Set your back, brace hard, and push the floor away. Keep the bar over your mid-foot.
formTips: Hips and shoulders rise at the same rate
Lock out by squeezing glutes — don't hyperextend

exercises.name: Hack Squat
exercises.tip: Feet low on the platform to maximize quad activation.
formTips: Feet lower on platform = more quads

exercises.name: Glute Bridge
exercises.tip: Drive your hips up until your body forms a straight line from knee to shoulder. Squeeze hard at the top.
formTips: Squeeze glutes hard at the top for 1-2 seconds

exercises.name: Leg Curl
exercises.tip: Hamstring isolation to finish the session.

exercises.name: Calf Raise
exercises.tip: Deep stretch at the bottom, full rise at the top.
